title: Why This Is the Most Exciting Time to Be Human | Ken Ono, Axiom Math
summary: Ken Ono argues that humans cannot win competing with AI on knowledge retention and retrieval, and that true intelligence in the age of AI lies in curiosity and human judgment. He invokes Ramanujan's legacy as an example of how unconventional thinking can reshape entire fields.
